definitions.text: Belonging to us, excluding the person(s) being addressed .
examples: Sorry, you're not invited to our party.

definitions.text: Belonging to us, including the person(s) being addressed .
examples: We must try to save our marriage for the sake of our children.

definitions.text: Of, from, or belonging to any entity that the speaker is a part of or identifies with, such as place of employment or education, nation, region, language, etc.
examples: Our safety record at ABC Widgets is very good.
In English, our nouns do not generally have gender.
